name: mfe-newsroom
description: Micro frontend news dashboard — Shell + 3 remotes via Vite Module Federation

scripts.install:all: cd shell && npm i && cd ../mfe-headlines && npm i && cd ../mfe-bookmarks && npm i && cd ../mfe-weather && npm i
scripts.build:remotes: cd mfe-headlines && npm run build && cd ../mfe-bookmarks && npm run build && cd ../mfe-weather && npm run build
scripts.preview:remotes: concurrently "cd mfe-headlines && npm run preview" "cd mfe-bookmarks && npm run preview" "cd mfe-weather && npm run preview"
